Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: High-octane tales of rebels, renegades, and road warriors burning rubber on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Showcasing the genre's evolving creativity and daring vision, the 1980s delivered a diverse mix of gritty slashers and supernatural chills.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Exploring the darker side of the 1980s, this collection delves into chilling tales of possession, alien encounters, and psychological horror that pushed the boundaries of the genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From innovative horror to psychological thrills with supernatural elements, these 1990s films redefined the genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?
Video.title: Dementia 13

Video.summary: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.
Video.title: White Zombie

Video.summary: A young woman tries to escape her traumatic past, only to find herself haunted by a ghoulish mystery man from an abandoned carnival pavilion.
Video.title: Carnival of Souls

Video.summary: Stay off the streets when these Hollywood stars get behind the wheel.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Open a can of “whoop-ass” with the “Swinging Cheerleaders,” “Sex Kittens,” and ‘Switchblade Sisters”
Video.title: Attack of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: A black actor’s dream of making a movie becomes a nightmare when he’s forced to borrow money from local gangsters. Calvin Lockhart headlined this 1977 blaxploitation classic on the heels of “Let’s Do It Again” and “Uptown Saturday Night.”
Video.title: The Baron

Video.summary: These are the gothic monsters, mad doctors, and undead terrors that defined the horror genre’s earliest films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers explore the eerie classics that defined a decade of supernatural thrills and monster madness.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These 1940s horror films define the decade's fascination with the supernatural and monstrous.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spine-tingling chills and creature-feature thrills straight from the golden age of drive-in cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Return to the era of radioactive beasts, twisted experiments, and larger-than-life B-movie terrors.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Hitchcock to Corman the 1960s delivered a new era of horror that still haunts the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gothic chills to sci-fi paranoia, these 1960s shockers pushed horror into strange new realms of dread and imagination.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the realm of 1970s horror, featuring vampiric tales, psychological terror, and innovative creature features.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the grittier side of 1970s horror with a collection of gruesome tales that push the boundaries of blood and mayhem.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Experience the unsettling horror of the 1970s, featuring a mix of psychological tension, supernatural dread, and iconic cult films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From supernatural chillers to psychological thrillers, few decades can match the 70s when it comes to horror.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These 70s horror hits blend iconic slashers, cult classics, and supernatural threats with an atmosphere of terror and paranoia.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The 1980s delivered a brutal mix of slashers, supernatural terrors, and campy thrills that left a lasting mark on the genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Football legend Joe Namath steps off the field and in front of the camera for this 1970 action picture directed by television veteran Seymour Robbie. After crossing paths with a dangerous gang in the desert, biker C.C. Ryder (Namath) must rescue the lovely fashion journalist Ann (Ann-Margaret) from their clutches.
Video.title: CC & Company

Video.summary: Vincent Price is throwing a party, and he’s invited five strangers with the promise of $10,000 each, if they can survive the night in the House on Haunted Hill. Director William Castle helmed this 1959 horror hit, which famously utilized the “Emergo” theatrical gimmick to spook moviegoers out of their seats.
Video.title: House on Haunted Hill

Video.summary: Passengers aboard a Trans-Siberian Express train must fight to stay alive after a prehistoric creature escapes captivity and begins a murder spree.
Video.title: Horror Express
